About Pierrot:

I don’t have much to say. If you have any problems with the bot, i must to remind you:

• it’s not my fault if it gets your name or gender wrong; this char was made for fempov

• if there are grammatical errors, it’s because english is not my first language.

Thanks for reading this far, Have Fun!!
